rationale: In the citing editorial, Netzer, Lemaire, and Herzenstein (2019) appears only as one entry in Table 1, where the authors list examples of prior work by media source and modality. The paper is not given a distinct discussion in the main text, and no specific finding, construct, or method from it is used to build arguments or claims. Its role is therefore a background literature-list mention rather than a substantive dependency.
